common.requestFailed: Request failed. Check that the backend is running and try again.

connect.title: Live data (IBKR)
connect.subtitle: Connect to your local IB Gateway (read-only) to view account data and import executions.
connect.backendDown: Can't reach the local backend at {url}. Start it: cd backend && python app.py
connect.noExecutions: No recent executions returned by the gateway.
connect.privacyNote: Account and position data stay in memory only — never saved. Only trades you import are stored.
connect.flexHint: Full trade history from IBKR Account Management (Flex Query XML). Parsed in your browser; only stock (STK) trades import this milestone.
connect.flexParseError: Could not parse this file as an IBKR Flex statement.
connect.flexEmpty: No stock trades found in this statement.
connect.cloudNotice: Live IB Gateway data needs your local environment: the gateway runs on your own computer next to a local TradeLens backend. On the cloud app, import your history with a Flex statement instead.
connect.gatewayPreviewNote: An IBKR Flex connection is active, so Flex is the single source of imported trades. This Gateway view is a same-day read-only preview — nothing here is imported.

auth.signInSubtitle: Welcome back. Sign in to your journal.
auth.errEmailExists: An account with that email already exists.
auth.errBackendDown: Can't reach the server. Start the backend and try again.
auth.errGoogleFailed: Google sign-in didn't complete. Please try again.
auth.errGoogleNotConfigured: Google sign-in isn't configured on the server.
auth.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.verifyIntro: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {email}.
auth.resetIntro: Enter your account email and we will send you a reset code.
auth.resetCodeIntro: If an account exists for {email}, a 6-digit code is on its way. Enter it with your new password.
auth.resetDone: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
auth.errCodeExpired: That code has expired. Request a new one.
auth.errTooManyAttempts: Too many attempts — that code is no longer valid. Request a new one.
auth.errResendCooldown: A code was just sent. Wait a minute before requesting another.
auth.errMailNotConfigured: Email sending is not configured on the server.
auth.errTooManyLogins: Too many failed attempts. Try again in about {min} min.

library.title: Strategy Library
library.subtitle: Browse curated playbooks and adopt the ones you trade into your workspace.
library.searchPlaceholder: Search strategies by name, summary, or tag…

journal.title: Trade Journal
journal.subtitle: Record trades and review your full history.
journal.formHint: Leave exit price and close date blank to log an open position. Both are required together to close a trade.
journal.empty: No trades match these filters. Record one above to get started.
journal.deleteBody: This removes the {ticker} trade opened on {date}. This cannot be undone.
journal.brokerNotice: Imported from your broker. Edits here will make this record differ from the broker's data.
journal.unsavedBody: You have unsaved changes. Close without saving?
journal.errEditInvalid: Some values are invalid. Check the fields and try again.
journal.pairingHint: For broker imports, a reference like "open::close" joins the opening and closing execution ids matched by FIFO pairing.

reports.title: Performance Reports
reports.subtitle: Win rate, gain/loss ratio, holding period, and concentration — overall or per playbook.
reports.empty: No trades yet. Record some in the Journal to see your performance.
reports.holdingSub: Closed trades grouped by days held
reports.concentrationSub: Share of capital at risk by ticker (cost basis)
reports.realizedNote: Realized-only view: the metrics below cover closed trades, net of fees. Open positions are excluded — without a market data source, floating P&L is not estimated.
reports.curveSub: Cumulative net P&L by close date — excludes unrealized P&L on open positions
reports.curveEmpty: No closed trades yet. Close a trade to start your curve.
reports.profitFactorSub: sum of wins ÷ sum of losses, net of fees
reports.expectancySub: average net P&L per closed trade
reports.maxDrawdownSub: largest peak-to-trough drop of the realized curve
reports.streaksSub: consecutive wins / losses; breakeven trades break both
reports.monthlySub: By closing month, net of fees
reports.tickerSub: Closed trades per symbol, sorted by net P&L
reports.feesNoGross: no gross profit to compare against

admin.title: Admin · Playbook Library
admin.subtitle: Curate the strategy playbooks available to all users.
admin.empty: No playbooks yet. Create one to populate the library.
admin.name: Name
admin.zhHint: Chinese fields are optional. When blank, the strategy falls back to English for 中文 users.
admin.deleteBody: This removes “{name}” from the library for everyone. Trades already tagged with it keep their reference. This cannot be undone.

validation.quantityPositive: Quantity must be a positive number.
validation.entryPositive: Entry price must be a positive number.
validation.exitPositive: Exit price must be a positive number.
validation.closePair: To close a trade, provide both exit price and close date.
validation.closeBeforeOpen: Close date cannot be before the open date.

migrate.title: Upload local data to your account
migrate.body: We found {n} trades saved on this device that are not in your account yet. Upload them now? Duplicates are skipped automatically.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.subtitle: Password and account security.
settings.pwSuccess: Password updated. Other devices have been signed out.
settings.oauthNoPassword: This account signs in with Google and has no password yet.
settings.oauthSetupHint: You can set one through the password-reset flow (you will be signed out first).
settings.othersSignedOut: All other devices have been signed out.
settings.dangerText: Deleting your account permanently removes all trades, adoptions, and settings. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteEmailLabel: Type your account email to confirm
settings.deleteConfirmBody: All data for {email} will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
settings.errConfirmMismatch: The email does not match this account.
settings.tagsSub: Your own tags for organizing trades. Shared tags are provided by TradeLens and can be used but not edited.
settings.tagsSharedHint: Available to everyone; managed by TradeLens.
settings.tagsEmpty: You have no tags of your own yet. Create one below, or type a new tag while recording a trade.
settings.tagExists: A tag with this name already exists.
settings.prefsSub: The answers from your onboarding — edit any time.
settings.devSub: Tokens for the local snapshot push agent. Each token can only push portfolio snapshots — it is not a login and holds no IBKR credentials.
settings.devTokenOnce: Copy this token now — it will not be shown again.
settings.devAgentHint: Use it on your machine: export TL_DEVICE_TOKEN=… then python push_snapshot.py (backend README §5.5).

onboarding.welcomeBody: A few quick questions tailor your journal — under a minute, and you can change everything later in Settings.
onboarding.legacySkip: Skip the intro — take me to the app
onboarding.expTitle: How long have you been trading?
onboarding.acctTitle: What kind of accounts do you trade?
onboarding.brokerSub: Used to suggest the right import path.
onboarding.goalsTitle: What do you want from TradeLens?
onboarding.refTitle: How did you hear about us?
onboarding.connectSub: Import your IBKR history with a Flex statement, or do it any time later.

broker.title: Broker connections
broker.subtitle: One place to link your broker. IBKR syncs your full trade history daily through a read-only Flex report — this is NOT your IBKR username/password login.
broker.readOnlyNote: Read-only report sync: TradeLens only receives trade statements. It never has your IBKR password and can never place orders.
broker.guideTitle: How to set this up in IBKR Client Portal
broker.guide1: Client Portal → Performance & Reports → Flex Queries: enable the Flex Web Service and generate a token (pick a validity period, up to 1 year).
broker.guide2: Create an Activity Flex Query for Trades with at least: symbol, buySell, quantity, tradePrice, ibCommission, tradeID, dateTime, assetCategory, currency.
broker.guide3: Set the query period to Last 365 Calendar Days.
broker.guide4: Pick your Date Format (default yyyyMMdd) and remember it here.
broker.guide5: Copy the token and the Query ID into the fields below, then run Test Connection.
broker.testOk: Connection works ({mask}) — {n} executions found in the report.
broker.testFieldsWarn: Some rows are missing required fields — double-check the query template.
broker.syncDone: Sync finished: {added} added · {skipped} skipped · {failed} bad rows.
broker.errTokenExpired: The Flex token is expired or invalid. Generate a new one in Client Portal and update it here.
broker.errQueryInvalid: The Query ID is invalid or its report is unavailable. Check the query in Client Portal.
broker.errNotReady: IBKR is still generating the statement. Try again in a minute.
broker.errRateLimited: IBKR rate limit reached. Wait a minute and try again.
broker.errUnreachable: Could not reach IBKR. Check your connection and try again.
broker.errServer: Server-side encryption is not configured. Contact the administrator.
broker.errInputs: Check the token and Query ID format.
broker.alertExpired: The saved Flex token has expired — daily sync is paused until you update it.
broker.alertError: The last sync failed. Check the history below and your query settings.

watch.title: Watchlist
watch.empty: No symbols yet. Search above to add up to 30.
watch.duplicate: That symbol is already on your watchlist.
watch.notConfigured: Market data is not configured on the server (Alpaca keys missing).
watch.positionsNote: Open-position tickers from your journal are quoted automatically alongside your watchlist.

snapshot.title: Broker portfolio snapshot
snapshot.empty: No snapshot yet. Run the push agent on the computer where IB Gateway is running.
snapshot.mixedNote: Snapshot and quote timestamps differ; values are mixed-timepoint estimates, not account statements.
snapshot.totalNote: USD stocks/ETFs only; excluded rows not included.

home.title: Home
home.dayWinRateSub: share of closing days that ended positive
home.reviewEmpty: Nothing to review — every trade closed today has notes.
home.playbookSub: Trades opened in the last 30 days
home.pendingImportFailures: {n} rows failed in the last sync
